title: Filtering by time recording date entry
excerpt:
Continuing the discussion from How to Query Time Tracking Filtered By a Specific Time (Day): 
Hi, do you know if there is a fix for this yet? I need this feature!

posts.author: ianmcn (ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Continuing the discussion from How to Query Time Tracking Filtered By a Specific Time (Day):

Hi, do you know if there is a fix for this yet? I need this feature!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ianmcn and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

We do not have an ETA on this, but I can add your vote to the feature request

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ianmcn !

My team and I at Lucid Day have created a fully thought through solution for Time Tracking. We offer a free demo of this solution as part of our consultations.

The time tracking solution helps to solve the following pain points:

  1. Knowing who is submitting time for which item
  2. Filtering time submitted
  3. Having a budget comparison to actual time tracking by project and client
  4. Reports for more than 1 week at a time

If this seems like it could help you, feel free to schedule a demo with me and my colleague here!

Thank you!
